name: GRN+ Reset V Candy
description: Chewable beauty supplement designed to help reduce puffiness and support a more defined facial contour. Formulated with Cactinea™ to help manage excess fluid and promote a lighter, less swollen feeling. Enriched with collagen, elastin, hyaluronic acid, and ceramides to support skin hydration and elasticity. Convenient on-the-go format with a pleasant tart cherry flavor.
usage_tip: Take 1 chewable candy twice daily, morning and evening. Suitable for regular use. Check ingredients for allergies before use.

name: GRN+ Good Night Melamate
description: A sleep-support supplement formulated with melatonin, amino acids, vitamins, and plant extracts to help promote restful sleep and relaxation. Helps regulate the sleep cycle, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality without next-day drowsiness. Contains melatonin, L-theanine, L-tryptophan, magnesium, and B vitamins to support the nervous system and natural sleep rhythm.
usage_tip: Take 1 tablet 1–2 hours before bedtime. Suitable for adults experiencing sleep disturbances, stress, or jet lag.

name: Tart Cherry Collagen Stick
description: Collagen jelly sticks with premium marine collagen peptides designed to support skin elasticity, hydration, and overall beauty from within. Helps improve skin firmness, as well as support healthy hair and nails. Infused with tart cherry concentrate for a pleasant taste without any fishy aftertaste. Convenient on-the-go format for daily use.
usage_tip: Take 1–2 sticks daily. Best consumed in the morning on an empty stomach, 30 minutes before meals. Chew the jelly before swallowing.

name: Power Glutathione Max Edible Film Type
description: Fast-dissolving oral films with glutathione designed to support brighter, more even-looking skin and provide antioxidant protection. Helps reduce the appearance of pigmentation and dullness while supporting overall wellness, including immune and liver function. Convenient format that dissolves on the tongue without water.
usage_tip: Take 1 film daily by placing it on the tongue and letting it dissolve. Suitable for daily use. Best results with consistent use over time.

name: Healthy Place Double Toning White Glutathione Collagen Stick
description: A convenient daily supplement in stick form with glutathione, collagen, and vitamins designed to support brighter, smoother, and more radiant skin from within. Helps improve skin elasticity, even out skin tone, and provide antioxidant protection. Also supports overall wellness, including immune and liver health.
usage_tip: Take 1 stick daily. Suitable for all skin types. Best used consistently for visible results over time.

name: Beauty of Joseon Ginseng Cleansing Oil
description: A lightweight cleansing oil powered by soybean oil and ginseng seed oil that gently removes makeup, sunscreen, and impurities while nourishing the skin. The micellar-based formula attracts and dissolves excess sebum and dirt without clogging pores, leaving the skin clean, soft, and refreshed. Infused with ginseng for added antioxidant care and a calming herbal scent.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply to dry skin, gently massage to dissolve makeup and impurities, then rinse with warm water. Follow with a foam cleanser for a complete double cleanse.

name: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Gentle Cleansing Milk
description: A gentle cleansing milk infused with Centella Asiatica and hyaluronic acid that effectively removes makeup, sunscreen, and impurities while keeping the skin soft and hydrated. The low pH formula supports the skin barrier, soothes irritation, and prevents dryness or tightness after cleansing. Ideal for sensitive and dehydrated skin, leaving it calm, smooth, and refreshed.
usage_tip: Suitable for dry, normal, and combination skin. Apply to dry skin, gently massage to dissolve impurities, then rinse with water. Can be used as a gentle daily cleanser.

name: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Light Cleansing Oil
description: A lightweight cleansing oil infused with Centella Asiatica extract that gently removes makeup, sunscreen, and impurities while soothing and calming the skin. Effectively cleanses pores, controls excess sebum, and prevents breakouts without leaving a greasy residue. The fast-emulsifying formula leaves the skin soft, refreshed, and hydrated.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially sensitive and acne-prone skin. Apply to dry skin, massage gently, add water to emulsify, and rinse thoroughly. Follow with a foam cleanser.

name: Dr. Ceuracle Pro Balance Pure Deep Cleansing Oil
description: A gentle cleansing oil enriched with probiotics that effectively removes makeup, sunscreen, excess sebum, and impurities while supporting the skin’s microbiome. Helps dissolve clogged pores and blackheads, balance oil production, and maintain a healthy skin barrier. Leaves the skin soft, hydrated, and refreshed without any greasy residue.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Apply to dry skin, massage gently to dissolve impurities, add water to emulsify into a milky texture, and rinse thoroughly. Follow with a foam cleanser for best results.

name: Dr. Ceuracle Hyal Reyouth Melting Foaming Balm
description: A 2-in-1 cleansing balm that melts into a soft foam upon contact with water, effectively removing makeup, sunscreen, excess sebum, and impurities without stripping the skin. Provides deep yet gentle cleansing while maintaining hydration and supporting the skin barrier. Enriched with hyaluronic acid, collagen, and soothing ingredients to leave the skin soft, smooth, and refreshed.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive and dehydrated skin. Apply to dry skin, gently massage, then add water to create foam and rinse thoroughly. Can replace double cleansing.

name: Medi-Peel Hyaluron Rose Peptide 9 Ampoule Eye Patch
description: Hydrogel eye patches enriched with rose extract, peptides, and vitamin complexes that deeply hydrate, refresh, and revitalize the under-eye area. Help reduce puffiness, brighten dark circles, and improve skin elasticity. Antioxidant-rich formula supports collagen production, smooths fine lines, and restores a youthful, radiant look.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply to clean, toned skin and leave for 20–30 minutes. Gently pat remaining essence into the skin. Can also be used on nasolabial folds and between eyebrows for extra care.

name: Dr. Althea Retinol Flat Iron Eye Roller
description: Anti-aging eye cream with retinol and bakuchiol that helps smooth fine lines, improve elasticity, and brighten the under-eye area. Reduces puffiness and dark circles while supporting skin renewal and collagen production. Features a cooling metal applicator that enhances absorption, improves circulation, and provides a lifting and refreshing effect.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially aging skin. Use in the evening 2–3 times a week and gradually increase frequency. Apply a small amount around the eyes and gently massage with the applicator. Always use sunscreen during the day.

name: VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot Vita-light Eye Cream
description: Advanced eye cream with micro-needle technology and niacinamide that helps brighten dark circles, improve skin tone, and smooth fine lines. Enhances elasticity, reduces puffiness, and supports skin renewal. The vibrating applicator boosts absorption, improves circulation, and delivers a lifting and refreshing effect. Lightweight gel texture absorbs quickly without stickiness.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply a small amount around the eyes and gently massage using the applicator until fully absorbed. Avoid combining with strong exfoliants or active treatments.

name: VT Cosmetics Cica Collagen Eye Cream
description: Firming eye cream with collagen and centella complex that helps improve skin elasticity, smooth fine lines, and deeply hydrate the delicate eye area. Brightens dark circles, reduces puffiness, and strengthens the skin barrier. Comes with a vibrating metal applicator that enhances absorption, boosts circulation, and provides a cooling massage effect for a refreshed, lifted look.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply a small amount around the eyes and gently massage using the applicator until fully absorbed.

name: VT Cosmetics Caffeine Eye Patch (Out of Stock)
description: Eye patches infused with caffeine, peptides, and collagen that help reduce puffiness, brighten dark circles, and improve skin elasticity. Provide intensive hydration, smooth fine lines, and restore a fresh, well-rested look. Advanced formula supports anti-aging benefits while strengthening the delicate skin around the eyes.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply to clean skin around the eyes and leave on for 10–20 minutes. Gently remove and pat in the remaining essence.

name: SKIN&LAB Clean&Easy Blemish Spot Patch
description: Waterproof hydrocolloid acne patches that protect breakouts, absorb impurities, and accelerate the healing process. Create a moist environment to support skin recovery while preventing infection and external irritation. Adhere securely to the skin, remain invisible, and can be worn under makeup for discreet daily use.
usage_tip: Suitable for acne-prone skin. Apply to clean, dry skin directly on the blemish and leave on until the patch turns white. Replace as needed.

name: Cosrx Acne Pimple Master Patch
description: Hydrocolloid acne patches designed to protect breakouts, absorb impurities, and speed up the healing process. Help reduce redness, draw out excess fluid, and prevent scarring while maintaining optimal moisture levels for skin recovery. Infused with centella asiatica to soothe inflammation and support faster healing.
usage_tip: Suitable for acne-prone skin. Apply to clean, dry skin directly on the blemish and leave on for 8–12 hours. Can be used both day and night.

name: Anua Ultra Thin Spot Cover Patch (75ea)
description: Ultra-thin acne patches that protect breakouts from external pollutants while absorbing excess oil and impurities. Help speed up healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent further irritation. Infused with ceramides and centella asiatica to strengthen the skin barrier, calm redness, and support recovery. Transparent design makes them suitable for daytime use.
usage_tip: Suitable for acne-prone skin. Apply to clean, dry skin directly on the blemish and leave on for several hours or overnight. Replace as needed.

name: Anua Triple Acid Spot Care Microdart Patch
description: Advanced microdart acne patches designed to target breakouts directly and deliver active ingredients deep into the skin. Help reduce inflammation, unclog pores, and accelerate healing while preventing post-acne marks. The formula with triple acid complex exfoliates, clears pores, and improves skin tone, while soothing ingredients calm irritation and support recovery.
usage_tip: Suitable for acne-prone skin. Apply to clean, dry skin directly on the breakout. Leave on for 2–8 hours (preferably overnight), then remove and replace if needed.

name: Numbuzin No.9 NAD+ Collagen Under Eye Patches
description: Lifting under-eye patches enriched with collagen, peptides, and NAD+ that help firm, hydrate, and smooth the delicate skin around the eyes. Reduce puffiness, dark circles, and fine lines while improving elasticity and overall skin texture. Provide a refreshed, brighter, and more youthful appearance.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply patches to clean skin under the eyes and leave on for 15–20 minutes. Gently remove and pat in the remaining essence.

name: VT Cosmetics PDRN Tension Toner Pad
description: Hydrating and firming toner pads infused with PDRN that help restore skin elasticity, improve tone, and boost radiance. Deeply moisturize, smooth texture, and reduce dullness while supporting the skin barrier. The stretchable pad design allows for use as a targeted mask, enhancing lifting and hydration effects.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. After cleansing, gently wipe the face with a pad. Can also be used as a quick lifting mask by placing pads on desired areas for 5–10 minutes.

name: Lagom Aqua Essence Pads
description: Hydrating toner pads infused with seaweed extract that instantly replenish moisture, soothe dryness, and refresh the skin. Help improve skin tone, support the moisture barrier, and leave the skin soft, smooth, and radiant. Gentle texture makes them suitable for daily use, including sensitive skin.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially dehydrated and dull skin. After cleansing, gently wipe the face with a pad. Can also be used as a quick mask by leaving pads on dry areas for 5–10 minutes.

name: By Wishtrend Green Tea & Enzyme Powder Wash
description: Gentle enzyme powder cleanser with green tea that exfoliates dead skin cells, removes impurities, and deeply cleanses pores without drying out the skin. Helps calm irritation, reduce excess oil, and improve skin texture while leaving the skin smooth, fresh, and balanced. Provides antioxidant care and supports a clearer, more even complexion.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Mix with water to create foam, gently massage onto damp skin, then rinse off. Use 1–3 times a week or as needed.

name: Isntree Mugwort Powder Wash
description: Soothing enzyme powder cleanser with mugwort that gently exfoliates dead skin cells, unclogs pores, and removes impurities without irritation. Helps calm inflammation, reduce breakouts, and balance excess sebum while maintaining the skin’s natural moisture barrier. Leaves the skin clean, smooth, and refreshed with a healthy glow.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially sensitive and acne-prone skin. Mix with water to create foam, gently massage onto damp skin, then rinse off. Use 1–3 times a week or as needed.

name: MOMMY CARE Yulmu Enzyme Cleanser
description: Gentle enzyme powder cleanser enriched with Yulmu (Job’s tears) powder and papain enzyme for mild exfoliation and deep pore cleansing. Effectively removes dead skin cells, excess sebum, and impurities while maintaining the skin’s natural barrier. Transforms into a rich foam upon contact with water, leaving the skin smooth, clear, and refreshed without irritation.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Mix with water to create foam, gently massage onto damp skin, then rinse off. Use 1–3 times a week or as needed.

name: Mommy Care Red Bean Enzyme Cleanser
description: Gentle enzyme powder cleanser with red bean extract that deeply cleanses pores, removes excess sebum, and dissolves dead skin cells without irritation. Helps refine skin texture, unclog pores, and leave the skin smooth, fresh, and balanced. Forms a rich foam when mixed with water, providing effective yet mild cleansing.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Mix with water to create foam, gently massage onto damp skin, then rinse off. Use 1–3 times a week or as needed.

name: SkinLab 3D PDRN Collagen Enzyme Cleansing Powder
description: Gentle enzyme cleansing powder that deeply purifies the skin while supporting firmness and renewal. Effectively removes excess sebum, dead skin cells, and impurities, leaving the skin smooth, soft, and refreshed without dryness. Formulated with PDRN and 3D collagen to improve elasticity, enhance skin texture, and restore a healthy glow.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Mix with water to create foam, gently massage onto damp skin, then rinse off. Use 1–2 times a week or as needed.

name: PRE MORE PURE ENZYME POWDER WASH
description: Gentle enzyme powder that exfoliates dead skin cells, removes impurities, and refines skin texture without irritation. Helps cleanse pores, control excess sebum, and improve overall skin tone while keeping the skin soft and hydrated. Calms inflammation and supports a clearer, smoother complexion.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Mix with water to create foam, gently massage onto damp skin, then rinse off. Use 1–3 times a week depending on skin type.

name: TIRTIR Hydro Boost Enzyme Powder Wash
description: Gentle enzyme powder cleanser that effectively removes excess sebum, dead skin cells, and impurities without irritating the skin. Helps smooth texture, refine pores, and brighten the complexion while maintaining the skin’s natural moisture balance. Leaves the skin clean, soft, and refreshed without dryness.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Use daily for oily and combination skin, and 1–2 times a week for dry or sensitive skin. Mix with water, lather, and gently massage onto the skin before rinsing.

name: Round Lab Baby Mild Sun Stick SPF50+ PA++++
description: Gentle mineral sunscreen stick designed for sensitive and delicate skin, including children. Provides broad-spectrum UV protection while soothing, hydrating, and strengthening the skin barrier without irritation.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially sensitive skin. Apply as the final step of your morning routine and reapply throughout the day, especially on exposed areas.

name: ANUA Zero-Cast Moisturizing Finish Sunscreen SPF50
description: Hydrating sunscreen that provides strong UV protection without leaving a white cast. Helps soothe, moisturize, and protect the skin from dryness, irritation, and environmental damage while maintaining a smooth, natural finish.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply as the final step of your morning routine 15–20 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply during the day as needed.

name: Huxley Sun Essence Stay Sun Safe SPF50+ PA++++
description: Lightweight sunscreen essence that provides high UV protection while deeply hydrating the skin. Absorbs quickly without leaving residue, helping to maintain moisture balance and protect against environmental damage.
usage_tip: Suitable for oily, combination, and normal skin. Apply as the final step of your morning routine 15–20 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply during the day as needed.

name: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Poremizing Tinted Sun Cream SPF50+ PA++++
description: Tinted sunscreen cream with physical filters that provides high UV protection while evening out skin tone. Helps calm irritation, hydrate the skin, and deliver a natural, smooth finish without a heavy makeup effect.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially sensitive skin. Apply as the final step of your morning routine. Can be used instead of light foundation.

name: Tocobo Vita Waterproof Sun Stick SPF50+ PA++++
description: Compact waterproof sunscreen stick that provides high UV protection while controlling excess oil and preventing shine. Ideal for targeted areas like nose, cheeks, and around the eyes. Leaves a smooth, matte finish and is perfect for on-the-go reapplication.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply as the final step of your morning routine and reapply throughout the day, especially on exposed areas.

name: House of HUR Weightless Sun Fluid SPF50+ PA++++
description: Ultra-lightweight sunscreen fluid that provides high UV protection while delivering hydration and a natural glow. Absorbs quickly without leaving a white cast or greasy finish, making it perfect for daily use and layering under makeup.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Apply as the final step of your morning routine 15–20 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply during the day as needed.

name: Dr. Ceuracle Hydra Barrier Sunscreen
description: Lightweight hydrating sunscreen that provides strong UV protection while strengthening the skin barrier. Helps prevent dryness, protect against environmental damage, and keep the skin soft, smooth, and healthy-looking without leaving a white cast.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially dry and sensitive skin. Apply as the final step of your morning routine 15–20 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply throughout the day.

name: Celimax Oil Control Mattifying Sun Stick SPF50+ PA++++
description: Mattifying sunscreen stick that provides high UV protection while controlling excess oil and reducing shine. Helps prevent pigmentation, soothe irritation, and maintain a smooth, non-greasy finish throughout the day.
usage_tip: Suitable for normal, combination, and oily skin. Apply as the final step of your morning routine and reapply every 2–3 hours, especially during sun exposure.

name: Dr. Althea Last Minute Skin Rescue Anastatica Mask
description: Hydrating sheet mask set enriched with Anastatica (Rose of Jericho) that deeply moisturizes, soothes dryness, and restores skin radiance. Helps improve moisture retention, smooth texture, and leave the skin soft, plump, and refreshed.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply after cleansing and toning, leave on for 10–20 minutes, then gently pat in the remaining essence. Can be used daily.

name: SKIN&LAB 3D PDRN x Collagen Wrapping Mask
description: Peel-off wrapping mask with PDRN and collagen that helps improve skin elasticity, restore firmness, and boost hydration. Enhances skin texture, promotes regeneration, and leaves the skin smooth, radiant, and lifted.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply a thin layer to clean skin, leave for 30–40 minutes until dry, then gently peel off. Use 1–2 times a week or as a recovery treatment.

name: Medicube Kojic Acid Turmeric Night Wrapping Mask
description: Overnight peel-off mask with retinol, vitamin C, and kojic acid that brightens skin tone, reduces pigmentation, and improves skin texture. Promotes collagen production, smooths fine lines, and leaves the skin radiant and refreshed by morning.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply a thin layer as the final step of your nighttime routine, leave overnight, and gently peel off in the morning. Use 1–2 times a week. Always use SPF during the day.

name: AXIS-Y New Skin Resolution Gel Mask
description: Soothing gel mask that hydrates, calms irritation, and helps improve skin tone. Gently exfoliates, reduces redness, and controls excess oil while promoting a clearer, smoother, and more radiant complexion.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially sensitive and acne-prone skin. Apply to clean skin, leave for 10–15 minutes, then rinse off. Use 1–2 times a week.

name: Medicube Zero Pore Blackhead Mud Mask
description: Deep-cleansing clay mask that absorbs excess oil, unclogs pores, and removes blackheads. Helps refine skin texture, reduce acne, and minimize the appearance of pores for a smoother and clearer complexion.
usage_tip: Suitable for oily, combination, and normal skin. Apply to clean, dry skin, leave for 3–5 minutes, then rinse off. Use 1–2 times a week.

name: Medicube Collagen Milk Toning Wrapping Mask
description: Peel-off mask with collagen and niacinamide that brightens skin tone, improves elasticity, and delivers deep hydration. Helps reduce pigmentation, smooth texture, and leave the skin radiant, soft, and lifted.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply a thin layer after skincare, leave for 20–30 minutes until fully dry, then gently peel off. Use 1–2 times a week.

name: TIRTIR Milk Skin Toner Light
description: Lightweight milky toner with 4% niacinamide that hydrates, controls excess oil, and strengthens the skin barrier. Helps reduce shine, refine pores, and improve overall skin texture while keeping the skin calm and balanced.
usage_tip: Ideal for oily, combination, and acne-prone skin. Apply after cleansing with hands or a cotton pad. Can be layered for additional hydration.

name: TIRTIR Matcha Skin Toner
description: Soothing and hydrating toner with matcha extract that helps calm irritation, reduce redness, and balance oil and moisture levels. Refreshes the skin, improves overall tone, and prepares it for the next steps of skincare.
usage_tip: Suitable for sensitive, combination, and oily skin. Use daily after cleansing with hands or a cotton pad, morning and evening.

name: Beauty of Joseon Ginseng Essence Water
description: Hydrating essence toner enriched with ginseng that deeply nourishes the skin, strengthens the skin barrier, and improves elasticity. Helps reduce fine lines, boost hydration, and restore a healthy, radiant complexion.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types. Apply after cleansing by gently patting into the skin. Can be layered for extra hydration.

name: SKIN&LAB Glycolic Acid x Vitamin C Calming Toner
description: Brightening and exfoliating toner with glycolic acid (AHA) and vitamin C that helps remove dead skin cells, unclog pores, and improve skin texture. Reduces dullness, evens out skin tone, and promotes a smoother, more radiant complexion while keeping the skin calm and hydrated.
usage_tip: Suitable for dull, uneven, and acne-prone skin. Use after cleansing with a cotton pad or hands. Start 2–3 times a week and increase gradually. Always use SPF during the day.

name: Biodance Collagen Gel Toner Pads
description: Collagen-infused toner pads that improve skin elasticity, hydrate deeply, and refine pores. Help smooth skin texture, reduce dryness, and prepare the skin for makeup, leaving it plump and radiant.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Use after cleansing by gently wiping the face or apply as a mini mask for 5–20 minutes for extra hydration and soothing.

name: Biodance Sea Kelp Gel Toner Pad
description: Soothing toner pads infused with sea kelp extract that help reduce redness, hydrate, and strengthen the skin barrier. Improve skin texture, balance oil and moisture levels, and leave the skin refreshed and calm.
usage_tip: Suitable for all skin types, especially sensitive skin. Use after cleansing by gently wiping the face or apply as a mini mask for 5–20 minutes.

name: Axis-y Daily Purifying Treatment Toner
description: Exfoliating toner with BHA, AHA, and PHA that helps unclog pores, control excess oil, and improve skin texture. Reduces acne, minimizes pores, and brightens skin tone for a clearer and smoother complexion.
usage_tip: For oily, combination, and acne-prone skin. Apply after cleansing using hands or a cotton pad. Use regularly to control oil and prevent breakouts.

name: Biodance Pore Perfecting Collagen Peptide Cream
description: Pore-refining cream with collagen and peptides that improves skin elasticity, smooths texture, and minimizes pores. Helps hydrate, even out skin tone, and reduce early signs of aging for a smoother and more radiant appearance.

For dry, normal, and dehydrated skin.
Apply a small amount to damp skin, gently massage in circular motions, and rinse with water. Use daily.
